ItacPersonItem.Notes: Joined the Ricovrati in 1685. He was a poet, ambassador at the Hapsburg court and subsequently orator for the city of Lodi in Milan. Organizer of the Coraggiosi Academy in Lodi. See kore details about his eventful life in the biography by Antonio Grimaldi, in DBI. Also member of the following Academies: Arcadia, Concordi Academy in Ravenna, and Accademia Fiorentina.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
